ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit station */,
  "strStation" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "strComputer" TEXT /* TCP/IP address or computer name of the station */,
  "ucProcessingArea" TEXT /* Number of processing areas at the station */,
  "strText" TEXT /* Text for user comments or feedback */,
  "strLocation" TEXT /* Physical address or location of the station */,
  "strZone" TEXT /* Zone or region where the station is located */,
  "intCapacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "boolIsOperational" TEXT /* Whether the station is currently operational */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit line */,
  "strLine" TEXT /* Name of the line */,
  "strLineColor" TEXT /* Color associated with the line */,
  "strLineType" TEXT /* Type of transit line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transit station */,
  "user_comment" TEXT /* User feedback comment */,
  "dtFeedbackDate" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "strFeedbackRating" TEXT /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "strUserEmail" TEXT /* Email address of the user (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_station_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line-station mapping */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transit line */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transit station */,
  "dtMappingDate" TEXT /* Date when the line-station mapping was created or updated */,
  "boolIsPrimary" TEXT /* Whether the station is the primary station for the transit line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_station_mapping_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_station_mapping_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "strUsername" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "strPassword" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "strRole" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dtReportDate" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "strReportType" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "strReportData" TEXT /* Actual report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each transit station
TCP/IP address or computer name of the station
Number of processing areas at the station
Text for user comments or feedback
Physical address or location of the station
Zone or region where the station is located
Whether the station is currently operational
